contract.name: v2/agency/treasury_account/tas/object_class.md
contract.description: Aggregates obligated and gross outlay amounts by object class for a Treasury Account Symbol, with optional fiscal year selection, filtering, and pagination.

tas.description: Treasury Account Symbol identifier echoed in the response, supporting hyphenated values and optional slash segments.
tas.constraints: Required. Server accepts syntactically invalid TAS codes and returns 200 with empty results; callers must include the trailing slash on the endpoint path to avoid redirects.

fiscal_year.description: Appropriations fiscal year to summarize; defaults to the API's current fiscal year when omitted (observed 2026).
fiscal_year.constraints: Optional. Accepts integers from 2008 through 2026 inclusive. Values outside this range yield 422 errors and non-integer inputs yield 400 errors.

filter.description: Text filter applied to object class labels with inconsistent token handling; partial tokens may match while exact words fail.
filter.constraints: Optional. Matching is case-insensitive but unreliable, and parent totals adjust independently from child program activity totals.

order.description: Sort direction for the chosen field.
order.constraints: Optional. Default is 'desc'. Allowed values are 'asc' and 'desc' (case-sensitive); invalid values return 400 errors.

sort.constraints: Optional. Default is 'obligated_amount'. Allowed values are 'name', 'obligated_amount', and 'gross_outlay_amount'; invalid inputs return 400 errors.

page.constraints: Optional. Defaults to 1. Must be at least 1; lower values trigger 422 errors and non-integers trigger 400 errors. Out-of-range pages return empty result sets with the requested metadata.

limit.description: Maximum number of rows per page.
limit.constraints: Optional. Defaults to 10. Accepts integers from 1 through 100 inclusive; values outside this range return 422 errors and non-integers return 400 errors.

treasury_account_symbol.description: Echo of the requested TAS, including any slash-suffixed components.

fiscal_year.description: Fiscal year actually queried (defaults to the current FY when the parameter is omitted).

page_metadata.description: Pagination metadata for the result set.

total.description: Total number of rows available for the query.

limit.description: Page size applied to the query.

next.description: Next page number when additional data exists; otherwise null.

previous.description: Previous page number when applicable; otherwise null.

hasNext.description: True when more pages follow the current page.

results.description: Object class aggregates for the TAS. Each entry includes nested program activity data that may be empty or retain unfiltered totals.

obligated_amount.description: Total obligations for the object class; may be negative during deobligations or when filtered.

gross_outlay_amount.description: Gross outlays for the object class; may be negative.

children.description: Program activity breakdown. Present for every object class but may be an empty array or retain unfiltered totals when filters are applied.

name.description: Program activity name label (e.g., REIMBURSABLE, N/A).

obligated_amount.description: Obligations attributed to the program activity; may be negative.

gross_outlay_amount.description: Gross outlays attributed to the program activity; may be negative.

messages.description: Informational messages. Typically empty, but pre-FY2017 requests include DATA Act coverage warnings.

messages: Account data powering this endpoint were first collected in FY2017 Q2 under the DATA Act; as such, there are no data available for prior fiscal years.

quirks: Requests without the trailing slash redirect with a 301 response that returns an HTML body instead of JSON.
Unknown or malformed TAS identifiers return 200 responses with empty results rather than validation errors.
Text filtering inconsistently matches object class names; partial tokens may succeed while full words fail, and parent totals can drop to zero while child program activities remain unchanged.
Children arrays frequently return empty for the current fiscal year even when parent totals are populated.
Requesting pages beyond the available range returns empty result sets while echoing the requested page number in metadata.
risks: Clients expecting JSON must handle HTML bodies for 301 redirects and 404 errors.
Filter behavior is unreliable and can desynchronize parent object class totals from child program activity totals, risking incorrect analytics.
Relying on the default fiscal year (currently 2026) can surface preliminary data with empty child arrays; callers should pin the fiscal year they need.
The API accepts invalid TAS identifiers and silently returns empty data, so upstream validation is required.
The API's IPv6 endpoint intermittently closes connections without an HTTP response, requiring IPv4 retries or resilient networking.
gaps: Exact tokenization and ranking rules for the filter parameter remain undocumented and unpredictable.
The backend logic that leaves child program activity totals unfiltered when parent rows are filtered is opaque; intent is unclear.
Accepted TAS formatting variants beyond single optional slash segments were not exhaustively enumerated.

response.bodyExcerpt: {"treasury_account_symbol":"097-X-0100-000","fiscal_year":2024,"page_metadata":{"total":5},"results":["Grants and fixed charges","Contractual services and supplies"],"messages":[]}

probes.notes: Baseline success with five object classes and populated children.
Omitting fiscal_year defaults to 2026 and returns empty children arrays.

response.bodyExcerpt: {"results":[],"messages":["Account data powering this endpoint were first collected in FY2017 Q2 under the DATA Act; as such, there are no data available for prior fiscal years."]}

probes.notes: Pre-FY2017 requests return empty results and populate a DATA Act warning.
High limit values above 100 are rejected with 422.
Exact word filter returns no rows despite matching object class names, highlighting inconsistent filtering.
Missing trailing slash triggers an HTML 301 redirect.
Invalid TAS identifiers return 200 with empty results instead of validation errors.

mismatches: Documentation omits the enforced 1-100 range on the limit parameter, yet the API returns 422 errors outside that window.
Docs describe filter as matching object class names, but probes show exact labels like 'Contractual' return zero rows while partial tokens do match.
Docs imply fully populated program activity children, yet current-fiscal-year responses often return empty child arrays.
gaps: Exact tokenization and ranking rules for the filter parameter remain undocumented and unpredictable.
The backend logic that leaves child program activity totals unfiltered when parent rows are filtered is opaque; intent is unclear.
Accepted TAS formatting variants beyond single optional slash segments were not exhaustively enumerated.
risks: Clients expecting JSON must handle HTML bodies for 301 redirects and 404 errors.
Filter behavior is unreliable and can desynchronize parent object class totals from child program activity totals, risking incorrect analytics.
Relying on the default fiscal year (currently 2026) can surface preliminary data with empty child arrays; callers should pin the fiscal year they need.
The API accepts invalid TAS identifiers and silently returns empty data, so upstream validation is required.
The API's IPv6 endpoint intermittently closes connections without an HTTP response, requiring IPv4 retries or resilient networking.
